fixes_detail.description: EVENING_session_boost gate 80%->20%. Post-dedup evidence shows evening WR 33-36% (not 62-65%). Meta_learning idea_2238f358 correctly invalidated. 89 duplicate insight entries (removed 2026-05-18) were the sole support for the 62-65% WR claim.
fixes_detail.expected_impact: Prevents +8pt evening boost from affecting 80% of evening signals. If evening is 33-36% WR as evidence suggests, removes net-negative confidence inflation from ~60% of previously over-boosted signals.

high_priority_findings.finding: EVENING_BOOST_POST_DEDUP_CONFLICT (conf=82%): EVENING_session_boost rule was at 80% gate boosting evening signals with invalidated evidence. After INSIGHTS_DEDUP_PRUNING (108->19 entries, 2026-05-18) removed 89 duplicate entries, the supporting data for 62-65% evening WR is gone. Internal baseline_wr=0.36 in the rule itself confirms real WR = 36%, not 62-65%. Meta_learning independently confirmed evening = 33% WR (n=27). Rule was actively harming 80% of evening trade decisions.
high_priority_findings.action: RESOLVED THIS RUN: EVENING_session_boost de-escalated 80%->20%. Monitor outcome_tracking on restart.
